data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Completion-verifier UNAVAILABLE: the Anthropic API returned 400 'credit balance too low' (req_011Cd1VPkmpgxTf2dMZTquWo), so the LLM gate cannot run (fail-closed). Closing on documented evidence: all 7 child tasks are status=closed (bffe/ad42/472f/cc0b/245e/9e76 verified+signed; 1787 force-closed pending post-deploy canary run); rebar's structural open-children guard confirms no open children. Other ACs met: Rebar Bot identity 594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d exists with pubkey + private key in SSM+GH (bffe); every ticket-event-writing env has signing setup landed; require_authenticated NOT flipped (schema default stays False, setup-only per scope). Closes unsigned (verifier could not run due to credit exhaustion, not on merit).". Session: 8309b909-b742-470c-83a4-e3c51bc85e4a.
